rect.style: fill: rgb(217, 192, 138); stroke: none; color: rgb(251, 251, 254); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 1; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto;

fill: rgb(226, 204, 150); stroke: none; color: rgb(251, 251, 254); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.92; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto;

fill: rgb(217, 192, 138); stroke: none; color: rgb(251, 251, 254); stroke-width: 1px; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-linejoin: miter; opacity: 0.4; font-family: "Anthropic Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; text-anchor: start; dominant-baseline: auto;
